Activity 01

Educational Outreach

Digital privacy affects every person, yet most people don't know their rights or how to exercise them. ODIPA closes that gap with free, practical education that meets people where they are.

Free to public
Overview

ODIPA's Educational Outreach program is our largest and most direct consumer service. We offer free online courses, live webinars, and in-person workshops that explain privacy rights and practical protective measures in plain language — no legal or technical background required. Our content targets the populations most at risk: seniors, students, low-income communities, and anyone who hasn't had access to quality privacy education. We measure success not by clicks but by behavior change: participants who understand how to opt out, how to read a privacy policy, and how to protect themselves.

What We Do

Public Courses

Structured multi-session courses covering core privacy concepts: data brokers, social media privacy settings, identity theft prevention, and more.

Live Webinars

Live online sessions on timely topics — from new state privacy laws to the latest data breach trends — open to anyone.

Community Workshops

In-person workshops at libraries, community centers, and schools in Los Angeles and beyond.

Senior Privacy Program

Specialized curriculum for older adults covering phone scams, Medicare fraud, social media safety, and protecting personal information.

Student Curriculum

Privacy education materials tailored for high school and college students covering digital footprints and data rights.

Corporate Training

Fee-based privacy awareness training helping employees understand CCPA/CPRA, GLBA, BSA, PCI DSS, HIPAA, HITECH, BIPA, GDPR, NIST, and internal data handling best practices.

Who We Serve
General Public

Anyone who wants to understand and protect their digital privacy — no prior knowledge required.

Seniors

Older adults navigating scams, digital services, and social media with customized, accessible curriculum.

Students

High school and college students learning to manage their digital footprint and understand their data rights.

Employers & HR Teams

Organizations seeking fee-based staff training on CCPA/CPRA, GLBA, BSA, PCI DSS, HIPAA, HITECH, NERC CIP, BIPA, GDPR, NIST, and industry-specific data governance requirements.

Year 1 Targets
500+
Year 1 participant target
12
Planned courses & webinars
4
Planned community workshops
29%
Free public services (of total activity)
Common Questions

Are ODIPA courses really free?

Yes. All consumer-facing courses, webinars, and community workshops are completely free with no registration fees or upsells. Corporate training is the exception — it is fee-based to sustain our free programs.

How do I register for a course or webinar?

Visit our Events page or join our mailing list to receive invitations when new sessions are announced. All free events are open to the public.

Do you offer materials in other languages?

We are working to translate our core curriculum into Spanish, Tagalog, and Mandarin. Contact us if you are interested in helping with translation or hosting a multilingual workshop.

Ready to Get Involved?

Join ODIPA and help protect digital privacy for everyone.

Join a Free CourseVolunteer as an Instructor

Organization for Digital Information Privacy & Awareness

Educating consumers and organizations about digital information privacy — advocating for practices and policies that protect people in an increasingly data-driven world.

ODIPA is funded through individual donations, corporate sponsorships, and foundation grants.

Privacy Newsletter

Privacy digest: breach alerts, new laws, research releases.

No spam, ever. Unsubscribe any time. We never sell your data. Privacy Policy
